global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on a discount offer and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a discount on products with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BoltCart Sale
elements.description: A bold, large text reading 'BoltCart' with a smaller 'UGC' underneath, prominently displayed at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: 30% Discount
elements.description: A small, circular badge indicating a '30%' discount, positioned at the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Background Shape
elements.description: A light teal background with abstract shapes and patterns that add visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Favorite Pick Message
elements.description: Text that reads 'Your next favorite pick' in a clean, modern font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Shipping Information
elements.description: A line of text stating 'Free shipping over $25', positioned just below the main body text.

elements.label: Get Offer Button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer', designed to stand out and encourage user interaction.

elements.label: Main Visual Element
elements.description: A large, rectangular shape in the center of the ad, possibly representing a product or app screenshot.

elements.label: Additional Visual Element
elements.description: A secondary visual element that adds depth to the ad, located at the bottom of the canvas.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Get Offer Text
elements.description: A small text button that reads 'Get offer', encouraging users to take action.

elements.label: 30% Discount Text
elements.description: A small text indicating a '30%' discount, designed to attract attention.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top center, body text is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
